_note: Role-by-role exit notes for the SLOTAB Board. One entry per role per school year. New entries created via Decap CMS at /admin (Board Handoff Notes collection). Rendered at /board (password-gated). NEVER paste passwords, account numbers, or other secrets here — describe where they live instead (e.g. 'SLOTAB 1Password vault, owner: Trina').

handoffs.what_worked: Sample template — outgoing officer replaces with 3-5 bullets on what's working well in this role. Things to keep doing for the next person.
handoffs.what_broke: Sample template — 3-5 bullets on what didn't work, what you'd change, what tripped you up. The single most useful section for the next officer.
handoffs.who_to_call: Sample template — names + phone/email of the people you actually called when something broke. SLOHS AD Phil ___, Activities Director Adam ___, Trina (treasurer side), vendor reps, etc.
handoffs.punted_decisions: Sample template — list anything you deferred to next year. Be honest about why (not enough time, needed board vote, etc.).
handoffs.vendor_relationships: Sample template — who's the friendly contact at each vendor, who's hard to reach, who needs to be called before email, etc. Personality notes the next person needs.
handoffs.passwords_vault_pointer: Sample template — point at where logins live, NOT the logins themselves. e.g. 'SLOTAB shared 1Password vault — current owner Trina, recovery email slotabboard@gmail.com'.
handoffs.calendar_landmarks: Sample template — the dates that snuck up on you. Booster Bash deadlines, fall fundraising drive kickoff, parent meeting prep, AD handoff window, etc.
handoffs.open_todos: Sample template — itemized list of unfinished business at handover. The next officer reads this Day 1.
handoffs.anything_else: Sample template — anything that doesn't fit above. Tribal knowledge, history of why things are the way they are, etc.
